name: local-markdown-studio
description: A local-first desktop Markdown reader and editor.

scripts.zip:mac: cd dist && rm -f "Local Markdown Studio-macOS.zip" && zip -qry "Local Markdown Studio-macOS.zip" "Local Markdown Studio.app"
scripts.zip:win: cd dist && rm -f "Local Markdown Studio-win32-x64.zip" && zip -qr "Local Markdown Studio-win32-x64.zip" "Local Markdown Studio-win32-x64"
scripts.test: node test/markdown.test.mjs && node test/project.test.mjs && node test/app-source.test.mjs && node test/electron-source.test.mjs
scripts.check: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/markdown.mjs && node --check src/project.mjs && node --check electron/main.cjs && node --check electron/preload.cjs
